response:
This April investor update from the company founders announces several key milestones: crossing a 10K MAU milestone, closing an $8M Series A term sheet at a $40M pre-money valuation, hiring a VP of Sales, and sharing core performance metrics including $85K in monthly recurring revenue (up 12% month-over-month), a $120K monthly burn rate, and 11 months of post-fundraise runway.
The sole noted pending action item for the business is that its fundraising round will officially close on May 10.
